model.description: Contained contract domain for resolver authority, lifecycle, generated route controller packets, projections, hooks, and validation evidence.

agent-context-resolver.leaf.domain-contr.description: Contained domain object model and ownership assertions.

agent-context-resolver.leaf.proof-contra.description: Resolver proof result and check contract.

agent-context-resolver.leaf.resolver-fix.description: Resolver route, fragment, propagation, hook-context, and runtime-denial fixtures.

agent-context-resolver.leaf.workspace-li.description: Resolver workspace lifecycle graph, edge, and packet fixtures.

agent-context-resolver.leaf.hook-contrac.description: Hook packet boundary and adapter evidence contract.

agent-context-resolver.leaf.prompt-class.description: Prompt classification adapter contract for route selection evidence.

agent-context-resolver.leaf.fragments-co.description: Fragment registry authority projected into resolver context packets.

agent-context-resolver.leaf.runtime-proj.description: Route reference projection contract for runtime-bound evidence.

agent-context-resolver.leaf.generated-fr.description: Generated resolver route, fragment, lifecycle, and turn-start evidence outputs.

agent-context-resolver.leaf.seed-resolve.description: Standalone seed package for the resolver contract slice.

agent-context-resolver.leaf.resolver-wor.description: Resolver output and lifecycle binding contract for generated route controller packets.

agent-context-resolver.leaf.seed-worker-.description: Seed validation and generation scripts used as worker evidence.

agent-context-resolver.leaf.merge-contra.description: Route result merge validation, deterministic reducer, bounded packet, and synthesis gate contract.

agent-context-resolver.leaf.agent-contex.description: Hook regression script that validates projected resolver packet evidence.

agent-context-resolver.sections-containe.subject: agent-context-resolver.root
agent-context-resolver.sections-containe.fact: Every agent-context-resolver contract section has a declared authority path back to the contract root.

agent-context-resolver.leaves-owned.subject: agent-context-resolver.root
agent-context-resolver.leaves-owned.fact: Every section-owned agent-context-resolver leaf ID resolves to a declared leaf with that section as parent.

agent-context-resolver.leaves-rooted.subject: agent-context-resolver.root
agent-context-resolver.leaves-rooted.fact: Every declared agent-context-resolver leaf has a root path beginning at the agent-context-resolver contract root.

agent-context-resolver.fixture-obligatio.subject: agent-context-resolver.root
agent-context-resolver.fixture-obligatio.fact: Every resolver fixture obligation references an existing assertion and targets a declared leaf or an explicitly planned target.

agent-context-resolver.test-obligations-.subject: agent-context-resolver.root
agent-context-resolver.test-obligations-.fact: Every resolver test obligation references an existing assertion, existing fixture obligations, and an existing check.

agent-context-resolver.assertion-coverag.subject: agent-context-resolver.root
agent-context-resolver.assertion-coverag.fact: Every active resolver assertion has declared fixture and test coverage or is explicitly coverage-exempt.

agent-context-resolver.migration-accepta.subject: agent-context-resolver.root
agent-context-resolver.migration-accepta.fact: The resolver closeout can export a bounded controller packet, predefined A2A route-worker invocation schema, deterministic merge reducer, bounded merge packet, adapter bindings, and route-worker evidence without SDK subagents, MCP execution, GitButler, or git-meta.

agent-context-resolver.fixture.leaves-ow.description: Positive workspace lifecycle fixture proving owned leaf IDs resolve through declared section ownership.
Negative resolver fixture proving invalid authority ownership is rejected.

agent-context-resolver.fixture.leaves-ro.description: Positive workspace lifecycle fixture proving resolver packets remain rooted in declared leaves.
Negative resolver fixture proving invalid route fragment ownership fails rooted-leaf validation.

agent-context-resolver.fixture.migration.description: Positive proof fixture for the generated controller packet, runtime-denied route-worker invocation model, deterministic reducer, bounded merge packet, and evidence-only closeout.

agent-context-resolver.test.sections-con.description: Validate section containment through the resolver domain CUE package.

agent-context-resolver.test.leaves-owned.description: Validate leaf ownership with positive and negative resolver fixture obligations declared as evidence inputs.

agent-context-resolver.test.leaves-roote.description: Validate leaf root paths with positive and negative resolver fixture obligations declared as evidence inputs.

agent-context-resolver.test.fixture-obli.description: Validate fixture obligation assertion and target references through graph constraints.

agent-context-resolver.test.test-obligat.description: Validate test obligation assertion, fixture, and check references through graph constraints.

agent-context-resolver.test.assertion-co.description: Validate active assertion coverage through graph constraints.

agent-context-resolver.test.migration-ac.description: Validate the final resolver migration acceptance exports, including route compiler proof closeout state.

agent-context-resolver.check.sections-co.failure: agent-context-resolver contains an orphaned, mis-owned, or unproven contract section.

agent-context-resolver.check.leaves-owne.failure: agent-context-resolver contains a section-owned leaf ID that does not resolve to a declared leaf with the section as parent.

agent-context-resolver.check.leaves-root.failure: agent-context-resolver contains a declared leaf without a root path beginning at agent-context-resolver.root.

agent-context-resolver.check.fixture-obl.failure: agent-context-resolver contains a fixture obligation with an orphaned assertion or target.

agent-context-resolver.check.test-obliga.failure: agent-context-resolver contains a test obligation with an orphaned assertion, fixture obligation, or check.

agent-context-resolver.check.assertion-c.failure: agent-context-resolver contains an active assertion without declared coverage.

agent-context-resolver.check.migration-a.failure: agent-context-resolver migration acceptance is not closed by exported controller packet, route-worker invocation, deterministic reducer, bounded merge packet, adapter binding, and evidence records.

a2a.description: Preferred adapter for bounded route-worker invocation packets.

controlInvariants: Adapters do not define graph truth.
Workers return evidence, not final authority.

agent-context-resolver.a2a-adapter.description: A2A route-worker adapter contract for executing declared resolver route work and returning evidence-only results.

agent-context-resolver.evidence.route-wo.summary: Template evidence record for a bounded route-worker output observed through the declared A2A adapter.
agent-context-resolver.evidence.route-wo.description: Evidence records bind route-worker invocation, adapter execution, and route result observations without becoming semantic authority.
